column.text:
• Toronto Blue Jays placed RHP Max Scherzer on the 15-day injured list with back spasms.
• Detroit Tigers placed 2B Gleyber Torres on the 10-day injured list with a left oblique strain.
• Houston Astros placed SS Jeremy Peña on the 10-day injured list due to a left calf strain.
• Los Angeles Angels designated veteran first baseman Trey Mancini for assignment.
• Los Angeles Dodgers designated right-handed pitcher Jonathan Hernández for assignment.
• Toronto Blue Jays recalled RHP Chad Dallas from their Triple-A affiliate in Buffalo.
• New York Mets sent CF Luis Robert Jr. on a rehab assignment to Triple-A Syracuse.
• Detroit Tigers activated RHP Casey Mize from the 15-day injured list.

x_article.title: MLB Daily Recap
